servinfo.title: Air Bag System Construction
servinfo.ptxt: There are two types of air bag system in this model, 8-channel air bag system and 9-channel air bag system, depending on vehicle specification.

servinfosub.title: Main Components of 8-Channel Air Bag System

item.ptxt: Driver and passenger air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger side air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger seat belt pretensioners
Driver and passenger curtain air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger forward impact sensors
Driver and passenger front side-impact sensors
Driver and passenger rear side-impact sensors

servinfosub.title: Main Components of 9-Channel Air Bag System

item.ptxt: Driver and passenger air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger side air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger seat belt pretensioners
Driver and passenger curtain air bag (inflator) modules
Driver and passenger forward impact sensors
Driver and passenger front side-impact sensors
Driver and passenger rear side-impact sensors

servinfo.ptxt: To supplement protection offered by seat belts, the air bag system includes the following air bags: front and side air bags for driver and passenger seats, knee air bag for driver seat (9-channel air bag system), and right and left side curtain air bags.
In addition to these air bags, the system also includes seat belt pretensioners for driver and passenger.

In the event of a frontal collision with an impact larger than the preset level, the front air bag (inflator) modules (stowed in the center of the steering wheel for the driver seat and under the top of instrument panel for passenger seat) and knee air bag (inflator) module (9-channel air bag system) are deployed. In the event of a sideward impact exceeding the preset level, the driver-side / passenger-side air bag inflator module as well as the curtain air bag inflator module (stowed in each side of roof) on the impact side are deployed.
The front seat belt pretensioners are activated whenever a frontal or sideward impact exceeding the preset level is detected to take up the sag in the seat belts.

entry.ptxt: Knee air bag (9-channel air bag system)

servinfo.ptxt: The air bag system is designed to activate only in severe frontal and sideward collisions. It is not designed to activate in rear impacts, rollovers, or minor frontal and sideward collisions; it would offer no protection in these types of accidents.
